message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  MessageAlign left
}
skinparam NoteBackgroundColor #FFFFDD
skinparam NoteBorderColor #777777

box "sw-explorer" #DDDDDD
participant WebApp as WA
participant SWData as SWD
end box

box "Example background processing module" #DDDDDD
participant Manager as M
participant MessageQueue as MQ
participant Worker as W
participant Memcache as MC
end box

-> WA : fetch new collection
WA -> SWD : fetch new collection
SWD -> M : schedule a job

note over M,MC
This is just an example.
We could got wi go with Celery, but sometimes it's good
to hide the concrete engine behind the abstraction layer.
end note

M -> MQ : schedule a job
MQ -> W : execute a job
W -> M : update job status
M -> MC : update job status
W -> M : job result
M -> MC : job result

-> WA : view pending collection
WA -> SWD : get job status
SWD -> M : get job status
M -> MC : get job status

@enduml
```
